evals.prompt: I want to create a consistent AI character for my short film. I have a photo of an actress and I need a character sheet with multiple angles so I can use her in different scenes.
evals.expected_output: Provide the character sheet prompt with reference image instructions, explain the 7-view layout, and mention generating 4 outputs to pick the best.

evals.prompt: How do I keep my AI character looking the same when I change their outfit? I already have a character sheet.
evals.expected_output: Provide the wardrobe change prompt and explain using the character sheet as image reference.

evals.prompt: I need to create an AI influencer character from scratch. No reference photo, just a description. How do I make a character sheet?
evals.expected_output: Provide the text-only character sheet prompt and explain the workflow.
